pages.text: $(italic)Backpacked$() gives you a second inventory you can wear. A single backpack — no tiers, no upgrades — worn on your back and opened with a keypress, wherever you are.$(br2)It is the early answer to a full hotbar: somewhere to put the cobble, the saplings, the seventeen kinds of seed you're about to start collecting.
pages.title: Backpacks

pages.text: $(bold)Wear it, open it.$() Equip the backpack in your back slot. Press $(bold)R$() to open the management screen — from there you can dye it, pin a cosmetic, and reach its contents.$(br2)The pack stays with you. On death its contents are kept according to the pack's rules, not scattered with your hotbar — check it first when you respawn.
pages.title: Wear It, Open It

pages.text: $(bold)To craft$() — see $(italic)EMI$() for the exact pattern (leather and a little iron). One is usually enough; a second is only for sorting one kind of haul from another.
pages.title: Crafting
